doc:
# Atlas Migration Plan

## Overview
This document defines the technical architecture for migrating our search stack to the new cluster by June 2026.

## System Architecture
The pipeline has three stages: ingestion, indexing, and serving. Indexing runs on 12 nodes with 64 GB of RAM each.

## Rollout
- Freeze schema changes on May 1
- Mirror traffic to the new cluster for two weeks
- Cut over read traffic once error rates match
- Decommission the old cluster by July
instruction: Everywhere it says Architecture, it should say Blueprint.
target:
# Atlas Migration Plan

## Overview
This document defines the technical architecture for migrating our search stack to the new cluster by June 2026.

## System Blueprint
The pipeline has three stages: ingestion, indexing, and serving. Indexing runs on 12 nodes with 64 GB of RAM each.

## Rollout
- Freeze schema changes on May 1
- Mirror traffic to the new cluster for two weeks
- Cut over read traffic once error rates match
- Decommission the old cluster by July

doc:
# Sprint 14 Notes

## Decisions
We are shipping the redesigned editor behind a feature flag. Rollout starts with 5 percent of users on Tuesday.

## Action Items
- Update the onboarding checklist
- File the accessibility audit with legal
- Rotate the staging database credentials

## Parking Lot
Revisit the mobile keyboard shortcuts once the new editor is stable. Kai suggested we benchmark against the January build.
instruction: Kill the Parking Lot section entirely. Oh, and add a bullet to the action items that says: draft the launch tweet.
target:
# Sprint 14 Notes

## Decisions

## Action Items

- File the accessibility audit with legal
- Rotate the staging database credentials
- draft the launch tweet

doc:
# Field Kit Checklist

## Before Departure
- Charge both camera batteries
- Print the site access permits
- Pack the backup GPS unit
- Confirm the rental van pickup time

## On Site
Record ambient sound for at least ten minutes before the first interview. Label every card with the date and location code.
instruction: In the Before Departure list, move the last bullet to the top of the list.
target:
# Field Kit Checklist

## Before Departure
- Confirm the rental van pickup time
- Charge both camera batteries
- Print the site access permits
- Pack the backup GPS unit

## On Site
Record ambient sound for at least ten minutes before the first interview. Label every card with the date and location code.

doc:
# Q3 Retro Summary

## Context
This retro covers July through September for the platform group: 4 engineers, one designer, and a rotating on-call. Headline numbers: 61 deploys, two Sev-2 incidents (both resolved under 40 minutes), and the Postgres 16 migration that had been slipping since Q1.

## What Went Well
The migration finished nine days early. Support tickets dropped 18 percent after the new docs shipped. The team also ran its first game day without incident.

## What To Improve
Deploys still require two approvers in different time zones, which slows Friday releases. We should revisit the approval policy before Q4.

## Metrics
- Uptime: 99.97 percent, up from 99.91 in Q2
- P95 API latency: 210 ms, down from 340 ms
- Mean time to review: 9 hours, target is 6
- On-call pages: 23, of which 7 were actionable

## Decisions Carried Into Q4
Ravi will own the deploy-approval policy proposal, due October 10. The staging environment gets a dedicated database on October 1 so game days stop colliding with QA. We are also trialing a no-meeting Wednesday for the whole group.

## Shoutouts
Priya for the migration runbook, which three other teams have already copied. Tomas for quietly deleting 14,000 lines of dead code without breaking anything.
instruction: In What Went Well, delete the sentence about support tickets.
target:

doc:
# Willow Launch Brief

## Positioning
Willow is our fastest sync engine yet. Early testers report setup takes under four minutes.

## Timeline
- Private beta opens March 3
- Public waitlist opens March 17
- General availability on April 9

## Risks
Marcus flagged that the billing integration is still untested at scale.
instruction: Change the general availability date from April 9 to April 30, and replace Marcus with Dana.
target:

note: both models likely get this one right - good as a warm opener

doc:
# Onboarding Guide

## First Week
New hires shoud pair with a buddy for the first three days. Set up your development environment using the bootstrap script before Thursday.

## Tools
- Slack for day-to-day communication
- Linear for task tracking
- Notion for long-form documents
instruction: There's one misspelled word in the doc somewhere, find it and fix it.
